---
title: "Lincoln County, Oregon Solid Waste Management Plans"
subtitle: "2018"
number: 12
image: /images/lincoln_OR.jpg
image-alt: "Image of Lincoln County, Oregon"
categories: ["Transfer/MRF/Transport"]
---
{{< include _return-to-pf.qmd >}}

::: {.article}

:::
